formulas.latex: \text{M3}: \left\{\begin{matrix} min & P \left(\mathbf{t}_{h} , \mathbf{e}_{h}\right) = \underset{r \in \mathcal{R}_{h}}{\sum} \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}_{r}^{O}}{\sum} \underset{\left(r^{'} , i\right) \in \delta_{h , r , i}^{D -}}{\sum} y_{r^{'} , r , i} & \left(a\right) \\ \text{s}.\text{t}. & \underset{\left(r^{'} , i\right) \in \delta_{r , i}^{-}}{\sum} y_{r^{'} , r , i} = e_{r} i = i_{r}^{O} , \forall r \in \mathcal{R}_{h} & \left(b\right) \\ & \underset{\left(r^{'} , i\right) \in \delta_{r , i}^{+}}{\sum} y_{r , r^{'} , i} = e_{r} i = i_{r}^{D} , \forall r \in \mathcal{R}_{h} & \left(c\right) \\ & t_{r^{'} , i}^{A} - t_{r , i}^{D} \geq C T_{r , r^{'} , i} + M \left(y_{r , r^{'} , i} - 1\right) i = i_{r}^{D} = i_{r^{'}}^{O} , \forall r , r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}_{h} & \left(d\right) \\ & y_{r , r^{'} , i} \in \left\{0 , 1\right\} , t_{r , i}^{A} , t_{r , i}^{D} \in \mathbb{Z}^{+} \forall i \in \left\{i_{r^{'}}^{O} , i_{r}^{D}\right\} , r , r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}_{h} & \left(e\right) \end{matrix}\right
